hero.name: Sergio Arroni del Riego
hero.subtitle: Industrial PhD Student in Intelligent Systems

about.title: About Me
about.description: A profile at the intersection of applied research and practical engineering. I combine my research work with a full-time position, participating in the entire development cycle: from algorithmic design in Python to production deployment.

optimization.title: Algorithms & Optimization
optimization.description: Implementation of solutions based on Bayesian Optimization (BoTorch), evolutionary algorithms, and time series forecasting.

nlp.title: AI & Language
nlp.description: Design of RAG architectures with Gemini (GCP) to process complex information.

mlops.title: Infrastructure & MLOps
mlops.description: Infrastructure management on AWS using Terraform to ensure scalability and efficiency.

xai.title: Explainable AI (XAI)
xai.description: Application of interpretability techniques to make complex models useful and transparent for business decision-making.

skills.title: Skills
skills.subtitle: Click on categories to explore technologies. Drag nodes to reorganize the graph.

roles.description: Hybrid role in a liquid organization, combining product development with technical coordination of multidisciplinary teams.
highlights: Technology transfer: bringing cutting-edge research into functional systems with business impact.
R&D in Tabular Generative AI: VAEs, Diffusion Models, and Transformers for data synthesis.
Single and multi-objective optimization with BoTorch and genetic algorithms.
NLP MVP based on RAG with Gemini on Google Cloud.
ETL pipelines and predictive models using the Darts library.
Autonomous infrastructure management through Terraform (IaC) and CI/CD on AWS.
Leadership in technical writing for public project proposals.

roles.description: Applied research in Machine Learning, contributing to research projects and scientific publications.
highlights: Research in sentiment analysis with Transformer architectures.
Development of defense systems against adversarial attacks in IDS.
Publication of 2 articles in internationally indexed journals.

roles.description: Technical support and university IT infrastructure management.
highlights: Technical support and IT infrastructure management.

certifications.name: Introduction to Deep Learning & Neural Networks with Keras
